name: Antinomia
description: Personal Tension Management (PTM): the in-tension counterpart of PKM, focused on contradictions, tradeoffs, anomalies, and conflicts between goals. 5 layers managed via YAML frontmatter, AI-powered Contradiction Hunter, multi-backend AI (Anthropic, OpenAI, Groq, OpenRouter, LM Studio local, Ollama local). Full English UI and AI prompts.
author: Giuseppe De Martino
